title: Link's Retarded Day
description:
A silly, short video done in Garry's Mod. I sort of half-made this for a friend, but anyway hope you enjoy the random, retarded day of Link. My next video is already planned. So be on the lookout for it in the next week or so :d

Rawr. The GET TO THA CHOPPA song was by Austrian Death Machine. The title is what I just said in big capital letters.
